query_normalized: anyflow: any-step video diffusion model with on-policy flow map distillation computer science
rationale: This paper belongs in the literature review because it addresses the same core mechanism (flow map/score distillation) and algorithmic property (diversity in generative models) as the user's question, satisfying criteria (a) and (d) for foundational methodology in flow-based distillation, even though it applies to 3D generation rather than video.
